status: Fixed in pending taskflow markdown path normalization patch
finding: Taskflow close fails at write time when task-card deliverables are Markdown code spans such as `tests/cli/example.test.ts`; close dry-run can still report ready while close --write fails with ATM_TASKFLOW_CLOSE_COMMIT_BUNDLE_INCOMPLETE.
expectedBehavior: Taskflow close should normalize path declarations consistently across deliverables, scopePaths, targetAllowedFiles, claim files, and direction locks, while still rejecting narrative non-path text.
evidenceOrRepro: TASK-RFT-0044 close --write on 2026-07-16 failed because the imported deliverable value included backticks and therefore did not match the active direction lock path tests/cli/team-legacy-runtime-governance-extraction.test.ts.
followUp: Keep the focused regression packages/cli/src/commands/taskflow/__tests__/commit-bundle-markdown-paths.spec.ts and split commit-bundle-assembly.ts / commit-bundle-assembly.spec.ts under the 600-line physical-file target in a follow-up atom-map card.
